patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the hit effect missing from the Hek and Sobek.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Update 15.1.0+15.1.01
patchlogs.changes: Changed Calculation method of 2 Syndicate Augment mods:Shattering Justice (Sobek Mod) changed to max +20 Additive to base Status Chance.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Sobek: Shattering Justice: adds 5% status chance

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Lato Vandal, Latron Prime, Lato Prime, Snipetron Vandal, Sobek updated fire sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sobek and Torid weapons so that they can be fired when coming out of a sprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: Further Sobek changes: more damage, longer reload.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Damage buff for Sobek, the new Shotgun.
